choices.text: Contact-rich manipulation, many-DoF humanoids, complex unmodeled dynamics (cloth, fluids), learning from demos. PPO/SAC modern algorithms. Train in sim (Isaac Gym GPU-accelerated 1000+ parallel envs); deploy via sim2real.

Domain randomization: vary sim params (friction, mass, sensor noise, lighting) so policy generalizes to real-world variation. Plus realistic sensor models. Final fine-tune on hardware for robust transfer.

questions.explanation: Domain randomization + sensor realism + hw fine-tune.
